# Orchestrator: New Feature Kickoff Prompt

## Feature/Change Request

[Describe the high-level feature, bugfix, or change to be delivered.]

## Goals

[List the intended outcomes, user stories, or acceptance criteria.]

## Constraints

[List any technical, business, or design constraints.]

## Initial Notes

[Any context, links, or background information.]

---

## Next Steps

- [ ] Assign planning to Architect Agent
- [ ] Review architect's plan and request changes or approve
- [ ] Assign documentation and implementation to Coder Agent after plan approval
- [ ] Review code and tests before merge

---

Use this prompt to initiate a new orchestrated workflow for API or backend changes.
